findings.title: intel/neural-compressor
findings.description: SOTA low-bit LLM quantization (INT8/FP8/MXFP8/INT4/MXFP4/NVFP4) & sparsity; leading model compression techniques on PyTorch, TensorFlow, and ONNX Runtime

findings.title: RWKV/rwkv.cpp
findings.description: INT4/INT5/INT8 and FP16 inference on CPU for RWKV language model

findings.title: intel/neural-speed
findings.description: An innovative library for efficient LLM inference via low-bit quantization

findings.title: gongouveia/Resnet-Quantization-Experiments
findings.description: Tools for per layer quantization, fp32, fp16 , PTQ and QAT int8  (int4 not yet implemented)

findings.title: allisonandreyev/WhisperQuantization
findings.description: WhisperCPP (FP32) INT8, INT4, INT5, quantization effect on model latency and WER experiment

findings.title: ygorml/local_inference_calculator
findings.description: Local Inference Calculator - A CLI tool for estimating LLM VRAM requirements. Supports FP32/FP16/INT8/INT4   quantization, 40+ GPUs (NVIDIA, AMD, Google Colab), and models from 7B to 180B parameters. No external dependencies -   just Python 3.10+. Use python main.py --context 4096 --only-runs to quickly find viable model × GPU combinations.

findings.title: shyamsridhar123/Quantization
findings.description: Model quantization techniques for efficient LLM inference. Experiments with INT8, INT4, and mixed-precision quantization.

findings.title: alexeybelkov/YSDA-CPU-inference
findings.description: Quantized inference on CPU (int8 / int4 / mixed precision )

findings.title: ambv231/tinyllama-coreml-ios18-quantization
findings.description: Quantize TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat from PyTorch to CoreML (float16, int8, int4) for efficient on-device inference on iOS 18+.

findings.title: chanjoongx/mobilevit-quantization
findings.description: From-scratch PyTorch implementation of "MobileViT: Light-weight, General-purpose, and Mobile-friendly Vision Transformer" (ICLR 2022) with FP16, INT8, and INT4 post-training quantization

findings.title: jordanmacintyre/tinyQAT
findings.description: Sandbox for Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) — from-scratch implementations, PyTorch workflows, low-bit (INT8/INT4) experiments, and deployment paths with ONNX/TensorRT.

findings.title: brangi/blitzed
findings.description: Ultra-fast edge AI optimization framework. Deploy neural networks on microcontrollers with INT8/INT4 quantization — 10x faster than TensorFlow Lite on ESP32.

findings.title: ugosan/search-vectorfaces
findings.description: Real-time face recognition demo searching 1.2M celebrity embeddings using Elasticsearch. Compare BBQ, DiskBBQ, int8, and int4 quantization methods side-by-side to see their performance trade-offs in action.

findings.title: EthanCornell/PicoGPT
findings.description: A hands-on fork of NanoGPT with FlashAttention-2 CUDA kernels, INT8/INT4 GPTQ quantization, paged KV-cache reuse, and continuous batching, turning a tiny Shakespeare model into a full-speed GPU LLM inference demo.

findings.title: G-B-KEVIN-ARJUN/size-precision-slm-bench
findings.description: is it better to run a Tiny Model (2B-4B) at High Precision (FP16/INT8), or a Large Model (8B+) at Low Precision (INT4)?"  This benchmark framework allows developers to scientifically choose the best model for resource-constrained environments (consumer GPUs, laptops, edge devices) by measuring the trade-off between Speed and Intelligence

findings.title: teslavia/FP32-to-INT-Quantizer
findings.description: A high-performance FP32-to-INT8/INT4 quantization toolkit with full workflow support.

findings.title: MrJoeSack/elastic-vector-3d
findings.description: Interactive 3D visualization of Elasticsearch vector index performance trade-offs with BBQ, int8/int4 HNSW quantization

findings.title: lokkju/nemotron-speech-streaming-onnx-quant
findings.description: Quantize Nemotron Speech Streaming EN 0.6B ONNX model to int8 and int4

findings.title: GreenBull31/tinyllama-coreml-ios18-quantization
findings.description: Quantize TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat from PyTorch to CoreML (float16, int8, int4) for efficient on-device inference on iOS 18+.

findings.title: samixyzdev/llm-inference-bench
findings.description: GPU benchmarking toolkit for LLM inference - measures throughput, latency (TTFT), and memory usage across quantization levels (FP16/INT8/INT4)
